TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Cinsbu == alang Cinsbu ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara buwan nya ga 52 buwan, 206 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 199 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 89%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. qalang maku lalu nya ga Cinsbu. sonnha smlalu. mhtu wagi lga bun wagi rhzyan rgyax qasa la nanu yasa ku Cinsbu sawnha smlalu. waqiq balay na rgyax. qmisan lga mutu mhlaqiy ru nanu yasa qu hyaq balay. misu qani lga. cyux muhi ana nanu ramat. pinbahu nha hya ga .nasi. qzimux. qapu ru kaway. mutuw wahan mbazi kya na okyak kahul hugal. qalang myan ga cyux si ppuyu sa qalang Smangus. qalang Cinsbu ga ungat pqwasan biru. rhzyal kki'an qalang Cinsbu ga maki 1 kyokay. qalang Cinsbu ga ungat hasisyo. qalang Cinsbu ga ungat ngasal sexu. qalang Cinsbu ga ungat khu skwan biru. qalang Cinsbu ga ungat ngasal pkita nbu. tay mkraya' na Cinsbu hya' ga Smangus. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: == ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu == alaŋ ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. qalaŋ maku lalu nja ɣa ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu. s~ɕonnħa s~ɕmlalu. mħtu waɣi lɣa βun waɣi rħzjan rɣjax qas~ɕa la nanu jas~ɕa ku ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu s~ɕawnħa s~ɕmlalu. waqiq βalaj na rɣjax. qmis~ɕan lɣa mutu mħlaqij ru nanu jas~ɕa qu ħjaq βalaj. mis~ɕu qani lɣa. ʦ~ʨjux muħi ana nanu ramat. pinβaħu nħa ħja ɣa .nas~ɕi. qzimux. qapu ru kawaj. mutuw waħan mβazi kja na okjak kaħul ħuɣal. qalaŋ mjan ɣa ʦ~ʨjux s~ɕi ppuju s~ɕa qalaŋ s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ. qalaŋ ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. rħzjal kkiʔan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu ɣa maki * kjokaj. qalaŋ ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu ɣa uŋat ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. qalaŋ ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu ɣa uŋat ŋas~ɕal s~ɕexu. qalaŋ ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu ɣa uŋat kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. qalaŋ ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu ɣa uŋat ŋas~ɕal pkita nβu. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: == Cinsbu == alang Cinsbu ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara buwan nya ga 52 buwan, 206 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 199 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 89%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. qalang maku lalu nya ga Cinsbu. sonnha smlalu. mhtu wagi lga bun wagi rhzyan rgyax qasa la nanu yasa ku Cinsbu sawnha smlalu. waqiq balay na rgyax. qmisan lga mutu mhlaqiy ru nanu yasa qu hyaq balay. misu qani lga. cyux muhi ana nanu ramat. pinbahu nha hya ga .nasi. qzimux. qapu ru kaway. mutuw wahan mbazi kya na okyak kahul hugal. qalang myan ga cyux si ppuyu sa qalang Smangus. qalang Cinsbu ga ungat pqwasan biru. rhzyal kki'an qalang Cinsbu ga maki 1 kyokay. qalang Cinsbu ga ungat hasisyo. qalang Cinsbu ga ungat ngasal sexu. qalang Cinsbu ga ungat khu skwan biru. qalang Cinsbu ga ungat ngasal pkita nbu. tay mkraya' na Cinsbu hya' ga Smangus. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: == ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu == alaŋ ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. qalaŋ maku lalu nja ɣa ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu. s~ɕonnħa s~ɕmlalu. mħtu waɣi lɣa βun waɣi rħzjan rɣjax qas~ɕa la nanu jas~ɕa ku ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu s~ɕawnħa s~ɕmlalu. waqiq βalaj na rɣjax. qmis~ɕan lɣa mutu mħlaqij ru nanu jas~ɕa qu ħjaq βalaj. mis~ɕu qani lɣa. ʦ~ʨjux muħi ana nanu ramat. pinβaħu nħa ħja ɣa .nas~ɕi. qzimux. qapu ru kawaj. mutuw waħan mβazi kja na okjak kaħul ħuɣal. qalaŋ mjan ɣa ʦ~ʨjux s~ɕi ppuju s~ɕa qalaŋ s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ. qalaŋ ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. rħzjal kkiʔan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu ɣa maki * kjokaj. qalaŋ ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu ɣa uŋat ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. qalaŋ ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu ɣa uŋat ŋas~ɕal s~ɕexu. qalaŋ ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu ɣa uŋat kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. qalaŋ ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu ɣa uŋat ŋas~ɕal pkita nβu. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨins~ɕβu ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕmaŋus~ɕ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
